column1: Gộp từ 3 tab: Paper Summary, Metric Formulas, Your Eval Pipeline
IaC-Eval: A Code Generation Benchmark for Cloud Infrastructure-as-Code Programs
column5: Prompt -> LLM -> terraform plan -> dependency graph -> OPA/Rego intent check; pass@k, intent pass rate

column1: Using a Feedback Loop for LLM-based IaC Generation
column5: Prompt -> template -> cfn-lint -> feed errors/warnings back -> repeat up to 10 rounds
column6: Errors drop strongly in early rounds, then plateau. Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19043

column5: Format check -> syntax check -> live AWS deployment -> feedback/retry/cleanup; passItr@n, compliance

column2: Multi-IaC-Bench: initial IaC + NL modification + updated template
column5: Initial IaC + edit request -> updated IaC -> syntax validation -> semantic alignment
column6: Syntax can exceed 95%, semantic alignment remains harder. Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.05303

column1: MACOG: Multi-Agent Code-Orchestrated Generation for Reliable IaC
column5: Architect/Provider Harmonizer/Engineer/Reviewer/Security/DevOps agents -> Terraform plan + OPA; IaC-Eval score, BLEU, CodeBERTScore
column6: Multi-agent improves IaC-Eval; constrained decoding and deploy feedback are important. Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.03902

column1: Evaluating Security Policy Compliance in IaC Generated by LLMs
column5: LLM -> tofu init/validate -> retry -> Checkov scan; validation pass, object recall/precision, failed policies
column6: Generated scripts still show security violations, often around 5-15 per script. Source: https://merl.com/publications/TR2026-036

column2: Fine-tuning dataset and security weakness tasks
column5: Base LLM eval -> GenSIaC fine-tuning -> recognition/prevention evaluation; precision, recall, F1
column6: Fine-tuning improves F1, e.g. 0.303 to 0.858. Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.12385

column2: Whether any of k independent samples is correct
column4: Code-generation benchmark with multiple samples per prompt
column6: Use bounded k and report n/c assumptions

column3: templates passing policy / templates scanned x 100%
